Session Title:: Biostats: Randomization/study design implementation in REDCap
Session Description w/ (Audience):: We will use real research study examples to illustrate a variety of use cases for multiple existing REDCap features, specifically those involving randomization and adaptive designs. We will also discuss the newer features that come along with REDCap 2.0 to allow for more study design flexibility and implementation within REDCap. Finally, we will provide some tips for users to consider as they think about implementing specific features for their projects.  (Applied Biostatistics Track)
_raw: Biostats: Randomization/study design implementation in REDCap

We will use real research study examples to illustrate a variety of use cases for multiple existing REDCap features, specifically those involving randomization and adaptive designs. We will also discuss the newer features that come along with REDCap 2.0 to allow for more study design flexibility and implementation within REDCap. Finally, we will provide some tips for users to consider as they think about implementing specific features for their projects.  (Applied Biostatistics Track)

Session Description w/ (Audience)::

Whether you're diving into a specific REDCap topic or just want to network with like-minded peers, this is your chance to create meaningful conversations. Follow the link below to propose a session or browse the list of current meet-ups and find one that sparks your interest!
https://redcap.link/birdsofafeather25    (All Attendees)

Session Title:: Optional Early Bird Session: REDCap Sustainability
Session Description w/ (Audience)::
The REDCap Consortium is deeply committed to innovation and advancing our mission of supporting global research and data management, even as federal and institutional budgets for clinical infrastructure tighten. While funding for innovation supports REDCap development, sustaining the platform after launch - including dissemination, maintenance, and support - has unseen and unfunded costs. 

In this session, we'd like to discuss potential approaches to solving this together, possibly transitioning REDCap to a Basic plus Premium model ensuring we balance the availability and evolution of existing, core tools while recovering sustainability costs. 

Join us as we collaboratively explore strategies to align REDCap's evolving business model with its commitment to empower research and doing good in the world. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)
_raw: Optional Early Bird Session: REDCap Sustainability

The REDCap Consortium is deeply committed to innovation and advancing our mission of supporting global research and data management, even as federal and institutional budgets for clinical infrastructure tighten. While funding for innovation supports REDCap development, sustaining the platform after launch - including dissemination, maintenance, and support - has unseen and unfunded costs. 

In this session, we'd like to discuss potential approaches to solving this together, possibly transitioning REDCap to a Basic plus Premium model ensuring we balance the availability and evolution of existing, core tools while recovering sustainability costs. 

Join us as we collaboratively explore strategies to align REDCap's evolving business model with its commitment to empower research and doing good in the world. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: (All Attendees)

This informational session will dive into the power of Bootstrap and how it can be leveraged to enhance the visual design of data entry forms, surveys, and project dashboards, all possible in vanilla REDCap (i.e. no External Modules necessary!).  We will cover how to get started, some simple examples, as well extreme examples.   (Technical)

We will cover how to get started, some simple examples, as well extreme examples.   (Technical)

Session Title:: REDCap, PHP and Cybersecurity: Securing REDCap installations
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Attendees will learn practical strategies and tools for securing REDCap installations by applying secure PHP programming principles, hardening server environments, monitoring logs, and defending against common vulnerabilities and reconnaissance techniques. The session combines foundational theory with demonstrations of scanning, penetration testing, and exposure mitigation using industry-standard tools and methodologies aligned with REDCap security guidelines and MITRE frameworks. (Technical)
_raw: REDCap, PHP and Cybersecurity: Securing REDCap installations

Attendees will learn practical strategies and tools for securing REDCap installations by applying secure PHP programming principles, hardening server environments, monitoring logs, and defending against common vulnerabilities and reconnaissance techniques. The session combines foundational theory with demonstrations of scanning, penetration testing, and exposure mitigation using industry-standard tools and methodologies aligned with REDCap security guidelines and MITRE frameworks. (Technical)

Session Title:: Project Migration & Project Portability: Dos and Don'ts
Presenter Information:: Lisa Hallberg and Bas de Veer
Session Description w/ (Audience):: This information session will go over the basics of migrating REDCap projects. We will provide use cases for migrations both within an organization and between organziations and REDCap instances, as well as providing some context for how unique this feature is from a broader software standpoint. We will do live demonstrations of the process and go over best practices based on our experiences with REDCap project migrations. (Administrative)
_raw: Project Migration & Project Portability: Dos and Don'ts
Lisa Hallberg and Bas de Veer

This information session will go over the basics of migrating REDCap projects. We will provide use cases for migrations both within an organization and between organziations and REDCap instances, as well as providing some context for how unique this feature is from a broader software standpoint. We will do live demonstrations of the process and go over best practices based on our experiences with REDCap project migrations. (Administrative)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: In this interactive session we plan to discuss and share what should be included in REDCap training designed for biostatisticians, and we also hope to gain an understanding of what biostatisticians see as training gaps for other types of REDCap users. Ultimately, we hope to aggregate the feedback and notes from the discussion to help facilitate development of training materials for a myriad of REDCap users, including biostatisticians.  (Applied Biostatistics Track)

(Applied Biostatistics Track)

Session Title:: REDCap 4 REDCap: Implementing a new user support model
Session Description w/ (Audience)::
We launched a new support model in July 2025, moving away from our long-standing support-via-shared-mailbox to utilising the REDCap Community Platform alongside REDCap itself.

I will cover various topics relating to this switch, both administrative and technical (but not too technical!), including:
- Why we wanted to move off the shared mailbox, and what we needed from an alternative system.
- The various types of support/admin tasks we have, and how each is facilitated in our new model: what the Community Platform handles, and what it can't.
- How we now have REDCap and the Community Site configured to meet our needs (this is the technical bit).
- How it's been going.

I will leave time for Q&A at the end.
 (Administrative)
_raw: REDCap 4 REDCap: Implementing a new user support model

We launched a new support model in July 2025, moving away from our long-standing support-via-shared-mailbox to utilising the REDCap Community Platform alongside REDCap itself.

I will cover various topics relating to this switch, both administrative and technical (but not too technical!), including:
- Why we wanted to move off the shared mailbox, and what we needed from an alternative system.
- The various types of support/admin tasks we have, and how each is facilitated in our new model: what the Community Platform handles, and what it can't.
- How we now have REDCap and the Community Site configured to meet our needs (this is the technical bit).
- How it's been going.

I will leave time for Q&A at the end.
 (Administrative)

Session Title:: MGB eConsent Template - Deploying at your Institution
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Mass General Brigham is proud to release our eConsent template to the REDCap community. It has recently been redesigned to use the new eConsent features. We invite REDCap admins who are interested in using REDCap as their remote electronic consent platform to attend to learn how to use this tool in their environments.  (Features/Functions)
_raw: MGB eConsent Template - Deploying at your Institution

Mass General Brigham is proud to release our eConsent template to the REDCap community. It has recently been redesigned to use the new eConsent features. We invite REDCap admins who are interested in using REDCap as their remote electronic consent platform to attend to learn how to use this tool in their environments.  (Features/Functions)

Session Title:: Managing complex recruitment and data types in a study of an emerging public health threat
Session Description w/ (Audience):: The Wound Study is investigating a novel type of wound related to illicit drug use. This presentation highlights the use of REDCap for a complex recruitment method and includes a variety of data types (recruitment management, survey data, medical photos, and drug testing) for a longitudinal study. This research showcases many interesting REDCap features in one study while deepening the understanding of an emerging threat connected to the opioid epidemic. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)
_raw: Managing complex recruitment and data types in a study of an emerging public health threat

The Wound Study is investigating a novel type of wound related to illicit drug use. This presentation highlights the use of REDCap for a complex recruitment method and includes a variety of data types (recruitment management, survey data, medical photos, and drug testing) for a longitudinal study. This research showcases many interesting REDCap features in one study while deepening the understanding of an emerging threat connected to the opioid epidemic. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)

Session Title:: Multiple REDCap instances - why and how to manage them
Session Description w/ (Audience):: There are several reasons for more redcap instances, eg. when you have to separate identifying from medical data (GDPR). I want to discuss the pros, cons, workarounds and lessons learned with examples. (Administrative)
_raw: Multiple REDCap instances - why and how to manage them

There are several reasons for more redcap instances, eg. when you have to separate identifying from medical data (GDPR). I want to discuss the pros, cons, workarounds and lessons learned with examples. (Administrative)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: Choosing the "best" REDCap design is never easy, especially when you want to capture longitudinal data. In this session, we'll discuss atypical ways to utilize the REDCap longitudinal design and event grid for data collection as well as other ways to consider capturing longitudinal data in REDCap. (Applied Biostatistics Track)
_raw: Choosing the "best" REDCap design is never easy, especially when you want to capture longitudinal data. In this session, we'll discuss atypical ways to utilize the REDCap longitudinal design and event grid for data collection as well as other ways to consider capturing longitudinal data in REDCap. (Applied Biostatistics Track)

Session Title:: Navigating Challenging Conversations as a REDCap Administrator
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Join us for 'Navigating Challenging Conversations' to explore how honest dialogue, even when difficult. can build trust and elevate your role as a business partner within your institution. Together, we'll share real experiences and practical strategies for handling tough questions and fostering collaborative communication. (New Administrator Focused)
_raw: Navigating Challenging Conversations as a REDCap Administrator

Join us for 'Navigating Challenging Conversations' to explore how honest dialogue, even when difficult. can build trust and elevate your role as a business partner within your institution. Together, we'll share real experiences and practical strategies for handling tough questions and fostering collaborative communication. (New Administrator Focused)

Session Title:: REDCap Use Case - Lessons from the Oxford Vaccine Trials
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Attendees will gain insight into how REDCap was deployed at scale during the Oxford-AstraZeneca COVID-19 vaccine trials, supporting the rapid and high-quality capture of data across multiple sites. The presentation shares practical lessons from that experience, covering e-consent, digital diaries, and real-time data monitoring, and reflects on what we have learnt since. We will also present recent advances from the Oxford Vaccine Group in applying REDCap, alongside novel technologies such as artificial intelligence and large language models, to enhance trial efficiency, CRF validation, and operational oversight in current and future studies. (Applied Biostatistics Track)
_raw: REDCap Use Case - Lessons from the Oxford Vaccine Trials

Attendees will gain insight into how REDCap was deployed at scale during the Oxford-AstraZeneca COVID-19 vaccine trials, supporting the rapid and high-quality capture of data across multiple sites. The presentation shares practical lessons from that experience, covering e-consent, digital diaries, and real-time data monitoring, and reflects on what we have learnt since. We will also present recent advances from the Oxford Vaccine Group in applying REDCap, alongside novel technologies such as artificial intelligence and large language models, to enhance trial efficiency, CRF validation, and operational oversight in current and future studies. (Applied Biostatistics Track)

Session Title:: Using REDCap As a Grants & Contracts Management Tool- Cradle to Grave
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Some organizations and smaller institutions don't often have the financial means to purchase elite electronic research administration systems to effectively manage their grant portfolios. Find out how a complete system was built from the ground up, over time using REDCap that tracks from Intent to Submit (ITS) all the way to Closeout and how Artificial Intelligence (AI) was used to make reporting more efficient. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)
_raw: Using REDCap As a Grants & Contracts Management Tool- Cradle to Grave

Some organizations and smaller institutions don't often have the financial means to purchase elite electronic research administration systems to effectively manage their grant portfolios. Find out how a complete system was built from the ground up, over time using REDCap that tracks from Intent to Submit (ITS) all the way to Closeout and how Artificial Intelligence (AI) was used to make reporting more efficient. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)

Session Title:: Implementing a Tiered Cost Recovery Model
Session Description w/ (Audience):: A review of the Johns Hopkins University tiered cost recovery, the infrastructure required to support it, and what we've learned over the last 8-years. We'll end with a discussion period for questions and input from others regarding their models. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)

Session Title:: Good Job: How to Be a Manager
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Many people are promoted into managerial positions without any training. This session will provide guidance on some basic managerial strategies and tactics and have time for audience discussion and questions.  (Administrative)
_raw: Good Job: How to Be a Manager

Many people are promoted into managerial positions without any training. This session will provide guidance on some basic managerial strategies and tactics and have time for audience discussion and questions.  (Administrative)

Presenter Information:: Ashleigh Lewis and Page Van Meter
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Boost your REDCap admin game! Get comfortable using the Database Query Tool to explore the backend tables. We will give examples of how it can help troubleshoot, pull advanced metrics, and audit projects . We'll also dive into the Control Center's newest features to keep your REDCap environment hip with the times! (Features/Functions)

Session Title:: Getting Started with Vue.js for external module development
Presenter Information:: Krishna Chaitanya Upadhyay and Chris Kadolph
Session Description w/ (Audience)::
This session will equip participants with a foundational understanding of Vue.js  and demonstrate how it can be applied in developing External modules, enabling them to start using it after the session with the help of a starter project. Also, how to setup and use Vue.js with Vite and bootstrap for modern development. 
 (Technical)

Krishna Chaitanya Upadhyay and Chris Kadolph

 (Technical)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: The best way to increase REDCap use (and reduce questions) is to properly train your users. However, we are often limited by a finite amount of time and resources. This session covers various ways you can run your REDCap training at your home institution including their pro's and con's.  (Administrative)
_raw: The best way to increase REDCap use (and reduce questions) is to properly train your users. However, we are often limited by a finite amount of time and resources. This session covers various ways you can run your REDCap training at your home institution including their pro's and con's.  (Administrative)

Session Title:: Programming Tips for REDCap External Modules
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Programming Tips for REDCap External Modules (Technical)
_raw: Programming Tips for REDCap External Modules
Programming Tips for REDCap External Modules (Technical)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: Learn about current state of automated testing. The majority of this presentation will be informational but there is a possibility for Q&A at the end. (Regulatory)
_raw: Learn about current state of automated testing. The majority of this presentation will be informational but there is a possibility for Q&A at the end. (Regulatory)

Session Title:: Detective REDCap: A story of AI collaboration to find syntax errors in @CALCTEXT equations
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Follow the journey of a headstrong REDCap administrator learning to collaborate with Chat GPT in finding @CALCTEXT syntax errors. You will learn best practices on creating functional @CALCTEXT equations, investigating error flags and solutions for finding errors within a large calculation repository. (Features/Functions)
_raw: Detective REDCap: A story of AI collaboration to find syntax errors in @CALCTEXT equations

Follow the journey of a headstrong REDCap administrator learning to collaborate with Chat GPT in finding @CALCTEXT syntax errors. You will learn best practices on creating functional @CALCTEXT equations, investigating error flags and solutions for finding errors within a large calculation repository. (Features/Functions)

Session Title:: Navigating Regulatory Compliance in Clinical Trials
Presenter Information:: Teresa Bosler, Theresa Baker, Nidhi Jethoo
Session Description w/ (Audience):: This session will highlight the biostatistician's role in ensuring regulatory compliance when REDCap is used in clinical trials, with a focus on data integrity, validation, and traceability. Participants will learn how to bridge operational data collection with submission-ready datasets, understand metadata and CDISC expectations, and identify practical strategies to meet FDA and GCP requirements. (Applied Biostatistics Track)
_raw: Navigating Regulatory Compliance in Clinical Trials
Teresa Bosler, Theresa Baker, Nidhi Jethoo

This session will highlight the biostatistician's role in ensuring regulatory compliance when REDCap is used in clinical trials, with a focus on data integrity, validation, and traceability. Participants will learn how to bridge operational data collection with submission-ready datasets, understand metadata and CDISC expectations, and identify practical strategies to meet FDA and GCP requirements. (Applied Biostatistics Track)

Session Title:: Caring for the Keepers: Building CREW for REDCap Administrator Well-being
Session Description w/ (Audience):: REDCap administrators are essential stewards of research infrastructure, yet our emotional well-being often goes overlooked. This session introduces CREW: the Committee for REDCap Administrator Emotional Well-being. CREW started as a small idea and a few honest conversations, and it has grown into something bigger: a shared effort to name the challenges we all face and explore why emotional health and sustainability matter for the long haul. We will talk about where CREW came from, where it is headed, and how we can all play a part in creating a healthier, more resilient REDCap community. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)
_raw: Caring for the Keepers: Building CREW for REDCap Administrator Well-being

REDCap administrators are essential stewards of research infrastructure, yet our emotional well-being often goes overlooked. This session introduces CREW: the Committee for REDCap Administrator Emotional Well-being. CREW started as a small idea and a few honest conversations, and it has grown into something bigger: a shared effort to name the challenges we all face and explore why emotional health and sustainability matter for the long haul. We will talk about where CREW came from, where it is headed, and how we can all play a part in creating a healthier, more resilient REDCap community. (Other / Both Tech and Admin)

Session Title:: Improving Quality and Efficiency with REDCap Data Quality Rules
Session Description w/ (Audience):: This presentation will describe how one team has utilized REDCap and statistical programming to streamline data cleaning, and areas of weakness. A brief discussion on further optimization will follow. (Applied Biostatistics Track)
_raw: Improving Quality and Efficiency with REDCap Data Quality Rules

This presentation will describe how one team has utilized REDCap and statistical programming to streamline data cleaning, and areas of weakness. A brief discussion on further optimization will follow. (Applied Biostatistics Track)

Presenter Information:: Andy Arenson, Michelle Lore, Laura McLeod, and Leila Deering
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Explore the challenges and successes of hosting local REDCap events (all organization sizes welcome). We'll share what works and what doesn't, and answer your questions. (Administrative)
_raw: Andy Arenson, Michelle Lore, Laura McLeod, and Leila Deering
Explore the challenges and successes of hosting local REDCap events (all organization sizes welcome). We'll share what works and what doesn't, and answer your questions. (Administrative)

Session Title:: Rapid Prototyping in REDCap: Leveraging the Conflux Suite of External Modules
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Discover how the Conflux suite enables REDCap developers to rapidly prototype and scale custom solutions using Git-managed assets and external files. This session will demonstrate practical strategies to overcome REDCap's development constraints and streamline workflows. Demo files will be provided in advance-participants are encouraged to download them and configure their integrated development environment (IDE) beforehand to follow along. (Technical)
_raw: Rapid Prototyping in REDCap: Leveraging the Conflux Suite of External Modules

Discover how the Conflux suite enables REDCap developers to rapidly prototype and scale custom solutions using Git-managed assets and external files. This session will demonstrate practical strategies to overcome REDCap's development constraints and streamline workflows. Demo files will be provided in advance-participants are encouraged to download them and configure their integrated development environment (IDE) beforehand to follow along. (Technical)

Session Title:: Validation of local REDCap features and modules
Session Description w/ (Audience):: The RSVC committee provides validation materials for 'core' REDCap features, but how might a site validate external modules or site-specific features? This presentation describes computer system validation processes and a risk-based approach for evaluating, testing, and maintaining 'non-core' features for system-level validation. Attendees will learning about principles for identifying and addressing risk when making changes to their local validated system. (Regulatory)
_raw: Validation of local REDCap features and modules

The RSVC committee provides validation materials for 'core' REDCap features, but how might a site validate external modules or site-specific features? This presentation describes computer system validation processes and a risk-based approach for evaluating, testing, and maintaining 'non-core' features for system-level validation. Attendees will learning about principles for identifying and addressing risk when making changes to their local validated system. (Regulatory)

Session Title:: Use of REDCap for operational support
Session Description w/ (Audience):: How can REDCap be used to follow up on REDCap Admin tasks and to follow up on clinical studies that you monitor? Setup and workflow of several projects will be explained. (informational session with Q&A) (Other / Both Tech and Admin)

Session Title:: A REDCap Admin's Call to Shine
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Here's a motivational talk tailored for REDCap administrators-those who keep the system running, support users, and bridge the gap between data and discovery.  It highlights their essential role, acknowledges the challenges they face, and inspires them to see their work as the foundation of research success. (All Attendees)
_raw: A REDCap Admin's Call to Shine

Here's a motivational talk tailored for REDCap administrators-those who keep the system running, support users, and bridge the gap between data and discovery.  It highlights their essential role, acknowledges the challenges they face, and inspires them to see their work as the foundation of research success. (All Attendees)

Session Description w/ (Audience):: Sick of keeping multiple Excel files updated?  This scalable, integrated architecture takes chaotic piles of PDFs, spreadsheets, and sticky notes and turns them into one clean, trackable system where nothing gets lost. Instead of chasing data, staff can actually use it-to make decisions, notify residents, and respond faster than ever.  In the past 12 months, the system has acquired 150 users and supports over $200M in project funding. (All Attendees)
_raw: Sick of keeping multiple Excel files updated?  This scalable, integrated architecture takes chaotic piles of PDFs, spreadsheets, and sticky notes and turns them into one clean, trackable system where nothing gets lost. Instead of chasing data, staff can actually use it-to make decisions, notify residents, and respond faster than ever.  In the past 12 months, the system has acquired 150 users and supports over $200M in project funding. (All Attendees)

Session Title:: REDCap: More than a Professional Home
Session Description w/ (Audience):: Implementing REDCap at an organization creates a nucleus around which informatics and related services tend to coalesce. But as many of us have discovered, REDCap can become a way of life and a home base, complete with a family of Consortium members. In this talk, I will reflect on my own journey as an informatics professional and share some of the lessons and joys I have encountered. (All Attendees)
